retry_reason: The function is a one-time cleanup; retrying would cause double-put and use-after-free. It always executes all puts unconditionally.
contract_summary: Put-wrapper that releases references on a i915_ttm_memcpy_arg (via i915_ttm_memcpy_release, which puts its src and dst refcounted sgts), a drm_i915_gem_object (via i915_gem_object_put), and a dma_fence (via dma_fence_put), after signaling the fence. This function is executed as an irq_work callback, typically after a memcpy operation completes. It is a one-time cleanup: after calling, all referenced objects are released and must not be used again. No further puts should be called on these objects. The caller must ensure that the irq_work is scheduled appropriately and that the objects are valid before this callback runs.
